channel.title: Comments on: Russian River: Blind Pig – Ep. 65
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!

item.title: By: t.b.
item.dc:creator: t.b.
item.description: Looks good. Have to try, thanks for the credits.
item.content:encoded:
Looks good.
Have to try, thanks for the credits.

item.title: By: Edmond Medina
item.dc:creator: Edmond Medina
item.description: I had this while in Oregon last summer. Very nice beer, wish I had some more out here in Virginia. Honestly, I almost prefer this over Pliny the Elder, another great beer from Russian River.
item.content:encoded: I had this while in Oregon last summer. Very nice beer, wish I had some more out here in Virginia. Honestly, I almost prefer this over Pliny the Elder, another great beer from Russian River.

item.title: By: Sean Inman
item.dc:creator: Sean Inman
item.description: When I have tasted this beer, I always taste grapefruit. Maybe my sense is skewed. But I really like Blind Pig even more than Pliny.
item.content:encoded: When I have tasted this beer, I always taste grapefruit. Maybe my sense is skewed. But I really like Blind Pig even more than Pliny.

item.title: By: andrewt248
item.dc:creator: andrewt248
item.description: Pink, that soul patch is off the charts, man! Forgive Paul for his ever-present sensation of "sweet smell". LOL Love the videos, guys! Keep 'em comin'.
item.content:encoded: Pink, that soul patch is off the charts, man! Forgive Paul for his ever-present sensation of “sweet smell”. LOL Love the videos, guys! Keep ’em comin’.
